facebook.content: I've walked with many believers who've tried to "find God" in grand, spectacular ways – and yet, I've found Him just as powerfully in the mundane routines of life. Can you relate – is God more real to you in the midst of chaos or in the quiet moments of everyday life?
facebook.fullPost:
I've walked with many believers who've tried to "find God" in grand, spectacular ways – and yet, I've found Him just as powerfully in the mundane routines of life. Can you relate – is God more real to you in the midst of chaos or in the quiet moments of everyday life?

instagram.content:
Faith is not merely the absence of doubt, but the presence of courage in the face of the unknown.

When faced with uncertainty, do you choose to lean into faith or retreat into fear?
